title: Explanation of Evangelion 222
wikitext:
[]: Explanation of Evangelion 2.22             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Mar 27, 2011 3:53 am In case you don't check the recent Wiki changes (I'm guessing most don't), I've been working on a counterfeit Eva 2.XX version of this awful thing , since it seemed like it might actually be useful. If you're too lazy to click on that, it's basically a little journey through the film that tells you what the people, places, mecha, vehicles, weapons, etc., etc., are called, and suchlike. I'm compiling the relevant data from the sources I have, mostly 2.0 CRC, and I've worked my way up to page 90-something in its Archives so far. So might as well let everyone know that this "Explanation" resource is online and being developed. Check it out here . Enjoy the kanji salad and consequent Translations of the Damned. (Anyone know where I can buy a Heat-, Pressure-, EM-, Explosives-, Nuclear-, and Organism-Resistant Super-Durable Secure Storage Portable Trunk Case ? ololol)

[]:             Quote Post by EvangelionFan » Sun Mar 27, 2011 6:04 am Reichu wrote: Check it out here .

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Sun Mar 27, 2011 6:53 am Awsome work. So Kaji and the base commander were on the ship. Honestly, i never would have guessed. Also, what the hell is Kaji the Chief Inspector of? Nerv? IPEA? B.O.O.B.S.?

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sun Mar 27, 2011 7:41 am So the green things on Asuka's suit WERE sensors. At least she didn't have to strip completely à la episode 11 *looking at the 1.11 one*...."Enchanted Shield of Virtue"?! Is that like, from some myth?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Mar 27, 2011 11:29 am Awesome stuff, Reichu! :) Good job!

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Mar 27, 2011 12:31 pm Thanks, all. I'll post updates here as I make my way through subsequent large chunks of 2.0 CRC. SaltyJoe wrote: Also, what the hell is Kaji the Chief Inspector of? Nerv? IPEA? B.O.O.B.S.?

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sun Mar 27, 2011 12:39 pm Reichu wrote: Tis is a reference to Disney's Sleeping Beauty , of all things.

[]: Re: Explanation of Evangelion 2.22             Quote Post by svenge » Sun Mar 27, 2011 2:46 pm I really enjoyed your translation of "Explanation of Evangelion 1.01", Reichu. I actually went to the trouble to create a subtitle track of this for my R2J 1.01 LE Bonus Disc. It was really tedious to manually time the 259 on-screen captions down to the frame, but worth it. I added the standard Funi 1.01 DVD subtitles as a separate track to make the disc more useful for general purposes as well.

[]: Re: Explanation of Evangelion 2.22             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Mar 27, 2011 3:44 pm @svenge: Glad to be of service. Y'know... Whenever I'm done with "Explanation 2.22", turning it into a subtitle track seems like the logical end result. (Though the film dialogue would have to be left out in a general release, for obvious reasons.)

[]: Re: Explanation of Evangelion 2.22             Quote Post by Hatsumi92 » Sun Mar 27, 2011 4:40 pm Reichu wrote: Check it out here . Enjoy the kanji salad and consequent Translations of the Damned.

[]: Re: Explanation of Evangelion 2.22             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Mar 27, 2011 5:34 pm Hatsumi92 wrote: I really enjoyed reading that. The big red rainbow being called "Door" is kind of interesting to me.

[]:             Quote Post by tomrule123 » Sun Mar 27, 2011 5:46 pm Shame that Studio Khara was inconsistent with this. My guess is that fans really don't care about that feature? Couldn't they just use DVD subtitle technology to re-create this? Well, anyway, thanks, Reichu, for continuing the experience of the Explanation of EVA.

[]: Re: Explanation of Evangelion 2.22             Quote Post by DanAwful » Tue Mar 29, 2011 10:48 am Reichu wrote: In case you don't check the recent Wiki changes (I'm guessing most don't)...

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Mar 29, 2011 11:29 am There's a "RSS" and "Atom" links at the bottom of the page in the Toolbox thing. It gives you all the changes though, not just the major ones.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Tue Mar 29, 2011 2:52 pm I will now comment on this. Specialized Seal-Guarding Limited Use Weapon, Artificial Human Evangelion, Local Specifications Model 05 Which means it was specifically build to handle eventual escaping angels in bethany base. "Semi Berserk State" is surely intresting here - is it compatrable to the "glowing eyes thing" Asuka and Shinji did in ep 8? Whatever it may be, together with Mari's level of physical injury, it futherly suggest that her synch rate is ISANELY high - it didn't make it into the actual movie, but a few previous drafts stated her as being better than Asuka. (Then again, seeing how much Mari's character was changed, forget the drafts - one of them had her saying that she hates living alone - The finished product prefers working alone, which is lampshaded by Misato) ...Also... " pseudo restored spear of longinus " - The ones calling her a female Kaworu were not far off. Mari WAS concieved as "Miko chanelling the gods", it's like she's an etheral, overearthly force like Rei or Kaworu (We NEVER see her in a domestic setting), but she's human. She talks. She's not godly and dignified like those two, but bestial. She never ceases to amaze me. Do you think she was meant to "pilot" the third angel? Where they trying to get a real angel into control instead of artificially building one? intresting, intresting. Can't wait for your translation on the entryplug thing. Please tell me when it's done. Makinami Mari Illustrious Is "Illustrious" her last name or a creative middle name? Ultimate All-Purpose Humanoid Decisive Weapon - Artificial Human Evangelion - Prototype Eva-00 (Upgraded) Upgraded...? Right, they gave it fins! How didn't I notice? It's a pity that it stayed yellow, tough. There's even commentary on Asuka's puppet? That should be VERY intresting once its translated. Type OMM7L Nerv Extravehicular Mobility Unit Now, we finally see Gendo in something else than his uniform, and it's an ugly, bulky spacesuit! why can't it be more like the plugsuits T~T Multipurpose (New Type) Plug Suit (Mari Custom Livery LOL Mari's tits are so large, she needs a custom made suit XD She probably has only recently grown these boobs, explaining why her old suit didn't fit anymore. That ominous "Door" has it's epic ring to it, hasn't it? [/b]

[]:             Quote Post by DanAwful » Tue Mar 29, 2011 2:54 pm Ornette wrote: There's a "RSS" and "Atom" links at the bottom of the page in the Toolbox thing. It gives you all the changes though, not just the major ones.

[]:             Quote Post by Dr. Nick » Tue Mar 29, 2011 3:19 pm Eva Manned Activation Experiment Test Subject Multipurpose Biosensor Equipped Plug Suit

[]:             Quote Post by rhfxz1s » Tue Mar 29, 2011 4:51 pm This is great stuff, Reichu. I could see this being really useful when later movies come out and people start cross-checking between films to verify arguments and whatnot.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Mar 29, 2011 4:51 pm Ornette wrote: There's a "RSS" and "Atom" links at the bottom of the page in the Toolbox thing. It gives you all the changes though, not just the major ones.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Apr 06, 2011 3:33 pm Today's update includes the revelation that Sahaq's first form is based on buckminsterfullerene .
